18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Amazon.com
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance; Increased durability, increased air flow, and intuitive connection
18.extractionRationale: One distinct third-party accessory product identified: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit explicitly designed for Clik Valve compatibility. The product title and description confirm it is a distinct accessory (pump head/stem kit) specifically for Clik valves.

36.evidenceText: Only a pump head adapter is required for easy inflation with a single click. ... adapter for the Schwalbe CLIK VALVE can simply be screwed onto the car valve.
36.extractionRationale: The source describes that adapters are required for the Clik valve but does not provide evidence of "frequently bought together" or "related products" sections on product pages, nor does it quantify what fraction of Clik valve listings display accessories. The accessory attach rate cannot be determined from the available evidence.

37.evidenceText: Discover the innovative Clik Valve from Schwalbe. Easy handling and maximum tightness for more safety and riding comfort.
37.extractionRationale: The provided source content does not contain specific information about replacement/spare parts, SKUs, valve cores, seals, o-rings, or replacement kits. The evidence only describes the general product benefits without listing any spare parts catalog or inventory.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss promotes their own "DT Swiss tubeless valve" with conical valve base design. No mention of Clik valve adoption in their product offerings.
45.extractionRationale: The source discusses DT Swiss's proprietary valve system rather than Clik valve adoption. No evidence from any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) indicates adoption of Clik valve as standard. Therefore, the percentage of major brands converting to Clik is 0%.

57.evidenceText: Product listing pages for BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core in various colors on BIKE24, but no stock status, availability dates, or "back in stock" information provided in the content excerpts.
57.extractionRationale: The provided sources contain product descriptions and features but lack any information about stock status, out-of-stock dates, or restock timelines. No "back in stock" date or availability information is present in the evidence to calculate a turnaround time gap.
